summary: Iteration 16 - Conversion Layer Post-Purchase & Exit-Intent Testing. All 6 features tested and passed: (1) Post-purchase page with Access Your Content banner, Create Account prompt, Go to Library and Return Home buttons, (2) My Library redirect to auth for non-logged-in users, (3) My Library shows content for admin (not empty state), (4) Exit-intent popup with headline, price, CTAs and close button, (5) Exit-intent frequency control (once per session), (6) Exit-intent suppression for logged-in users with content, (7) Guest checkout flow with email input.
critical_code_review_comments: OrderSuccess.js: Correctly implements data-testid='access-content-section' green banner, data-testid='create-account-prompt' for guests, data-testid='go-to-library-btn' and data-testid='return-home-btn'

MyLibrary.js: Correctly redirects to /auth when not logged in, shows content for users with purchases, implements data-testid='library-empty-state', data-testid='browse-lessons-btn', data-testid='get-starter-bundle-btn'

ExitIntentPopup.js: Correctly implements 5-second activation delay, mouseleave detection with clientY<=0, sessionStorage frequency control, suppression for users with access_level !== 'free', all data-testid attributes present
context_for_next_testing_agent: All conversion layer features verified working: Post-purchase page, My Library empty state, Exit-intent popup with frequency control and suppression, Guest checkout flow. Admin user has access_level='admin' which correctly suppresses the exit-intent popup.

post_purchase_page.details: Order success page at /order-success?order=TEST-ORDER shows: green 'Access Your Content' banner (data-testid='access-content-section'), 'Create Account to Save Your Library' section for guests (data-testid='create-account-prompt'), 'Create Free Account' button (data-testid='create-account-btn'), 'Go to My Library' button (data-testid='go-to-library-btn'), 'Return to Home' button (data-testid='return-home-btn')

my_library_redirect.details: Navigating to /my-library without being logged in correctly redirects to /auth

my_library_content.details: Admin user (overflowharvest@gmail.com) sees content in My Library, NOT the empty state. Empty state has data-testid='library-empty-state', 'Browse Lessons' (data-testid='browse-lessons-btn'), 'Get Starter Bundle' (data-testid='get-starter-bundle-btn')

exit_intent_popup.details: Exit-intent popup appears after 6 seconds wait + mouseleave with clientY=-1. Contains: 'Before you go...' headline (data-testid='exit-popup-headline'), '$21.99' bundle price, 'Get the Bundle' button (data-testid='exit-popup-get-bundle'), 'Try a Free Lesson' button (data-testid='exit-popup-free-lesson'), X close button (data-testid='exit-popup-close')

exit_intent_frequency.details: After closing popup, triggering mouseleave again does NOT show popup. sessionStorage 'exit_popup_shown' flag is set to 'true'

exit_intent_suppression.details: Logged-in admin user (access_level='admin') does NOT see exit-intent popup. Suppression logic checks access_level !== 'free'

guest_checkout.details: Guest checkout flow: Add item from /quick-order → Proceed to Checkout → 'Continue as Guest' button available → Guest email input field available and fillable
